articles.title: Show HN: Palmier – bridge your AI agents and your phone
articles.summary: Hi HN — I built Palmier.Palmier bridges your AI agents and your phone.It does two things:1. It lets you use your phone to directly control AI agents running on your computer, from anywhere.2. It gives your AI agents access to your phone, wherever you are — including things like push notifications, SMS, calendar, contacts, sending email, creating calendar events, location, and more.A few details:* Supports 15+ agent CLIs* Supports Linux, Windows, and macOS* What runs on your computer and your pho

articles.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing
articles.summary: This sentence construction ("It's not just this — it's that") has become so common in AI-generated writing that it's no longer just a clue that a piece of writing may be synthetic — it's almost a guarantee.

articles.title: Cloud development platform Vercel was hacked
articles.summary: Vercel, a major development platform that hosts and deploys web apps, was compromised, and the hackers are attempting to sell stolen data. A person claiming to be a member of ShinyHunters, which was behind the recent hack of Rockstar Games, posted some data online, including employee names, email addresses, and activity time stamps. Vercel confirmed […]

articles.title: John Ternus’s first big problem is AI
articles.summary: Less than a year ago, Apple made headlines for a lack of AI announcements at its annual WWDC event. articles.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
articles.summary: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling this feature out to both desktop and iOS in all of these countries except Japan.
